## Provider

**Name:** <!-- e.g. Groq, DeepSeek, Together -->

**Website:** <!-- e.g. https://console.groq.com -->

**API base URL:** <!-- e.g. https://api.groq.com/openai/v1 -->

**API type:**
- [ ] OpenAI-compatible (`/v1/chat/completions`, `/v1/models`)
- [ ] Anthropic-compatible (`/v1/messages`)

## Free Tier Details

- **Free tier description:** <!-- e.g. "30 RPM, 1000 RPD, no CC" -->
- **Requires credit card?** Yes / No
- **Permanent free tier?** Yes / No
- **Rate limits:** <!-- if known -->

## Why this provider?

<!-- What makes this provider worth adding? Good coding models? Unique capabilities? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues — this provider hasn't been requested yet
- [ ] I've confirmed the provider has an OpenAI or Anthropic-compatible API
- [ ] I've included the correct base URL for the API (not just the website)
